message:
Command `cd /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526

for SEQ_NAME in xip sram irq dma pinmux sys_reset rand_sys; do
  RESULT=$(timeout 25 /tmp/test_${SEQ_NAME}.vvp 2>&1 | grep -E "PASS|FAIL|SMOKE_SUMMARY|timeout" | tail -3)
  echo "${SEQ_NAME^^}: ${RESULT}"
done` executed with exit code 0.
